summary: The diff implements the requested single-page Uttah Electronics marketing site with responsive navigation/sections, a 3D hero scene using React Three Fiber, an additional 3D animated section divider with graceful degradation, a static 6-item product grid, a contact form with success interaction, and a consistent charcoal/emerald visual theme. Some extra authentication/actor scaffolding is added that was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication provider/context and related actor-query plumbing (React Query) added despite being explicitly not required for this request.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest states third-party auth providers are a non-goal and Internet Identity is supported but not required; requirements focus on marketing site + 3D + theme, not authentication.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend Motoko actor file added (empty actor) even though no backend functionality was requested.
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirements mention backend endpoints or backend changes; the added backend actor appears to be scaffolding unrelated to the marketing-site requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer includes a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested in BuildRequest requirements or acceptance criteria; adds external branding/attribution behavior beyond scope.
